scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @atlas/api" "npm run dev -w @atlas/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @atlas/api && npm run build -w @atlas/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @atlas/api && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @atlas/api && npm run lint -w @atlas/web
